---
title: Scotrail Performance
---

```{r}
# Read in data and load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(reactable)
library(reactablefmtr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext)
library(ggiraph)
library(glue)
daily_data <- readr::read_csv("data/daily_data.csv")
monthly_data <- readr::read_csv("data/monthly_data.csv")
monthly_data_stations <- readr::read_csv("data/monthly_data_stations.csv")
today_date <- daily_data |>
  slice_max(date) |>
  pull(date)
today_month <- monthly_data |>
  slice_max(date) |>
  pull(date)
```

# Daily 

## Column {width="40%"}

### Row

```{r}
#| component: valuebox
#| title: Arriving within 5 minutes
perc_ppm <- daily_data |>
  slice_max(date) |>
  pull(PPM) |>
  paste0("%")
list(
  icon = "stopwatch",
  color = "primary",
  value = perc_ppm
)
```

### Row

```{r}
#| component: valuebox
#| title: Unplanned cancellations
num_unplanned <- daily_data |>
  slice_max(date) |>
  pull(`Number of unplanned cancellations`)
list(
  icon = "x-circle",
  color = "primary",
  value = num_unplanned
)
```

### Row

```{r}
#| component: valuebox
#| title: Previous day train crew absences
num_absent <- daily_data |>
  slice_max(date) |>
  pull(`Previous day traincrew absences`)
list(
  icon = "person-dash",
  color = "primary",
  value = num_absent
)
```

## Column {width="60%"}

::: {.card height="75%" expandable=false}

::: {.panel-tabset} 

## Punctuality

```{r}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| expandable: false
line_chart_data <- daily_data |>
  mutate(
    below = if_else(
      PPM < 92.5, "(below target)", ""
    ),
    label = glue('<b>{format(as.Date(date), "%A %e %B, %Y")}</b><br>{PPM}% {below}')
  )
g_int <- ggplot(
  data = line_chart_data,
  mapping = aes(x = date, y = PPM)
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 92.5, colour = "red") +
  geom_point_interactive(
    mapping = aes(tooltip = label, data_id = date),
    colour = "white",
    alpha = 0,
    size = 5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = format(as.Date(today_date), "%A %e %B, %Y"),
    subtitle = "Percentage of trains that arrive at their destination within five minutes of the advertised time",
    caption = "**Note**: When a specially advertised revised timetable is in operation, at times of engineering work for example, performance is measured against the revised times.",
    x = NULL, y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#F2F4F8", colour = "#F2F4F8"),
    plot.title = element_textbox_simple(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_textbox_simple(),
    plot.caption = element_textbox_simple(margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 10)),
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.caption.position = "plot"
  )
girafe(
  ggobj = g_int,
  bg = "#F2F4F8",
  options = list(
    opts_tooltip(
      css = "
        padding: 5pt;
        font-size: 1rem;
        background-color: #DADFE7;
        border-radius: 3px;
        line-height: 1;
        color: #0E1116;"
    ),
    opts_hover(css = "opacity:1;"),
    opts_hover_inv(css = "opacity:0;"),
    opts_toolbar(saveaspng = FALSE, hidden = "saveaspng"),
    opts_zoom(max = 1),
    opts_sizing(rescale = TRUE, width = 1)
  )
)
```

## Cancellations {expandable=false}

```{r}
#| expandable: false
bar_chart_data <- daily_data |>
  select(date, `Number of planned cancellations`, `Number of unplanned cancellations`) |>
  mutate(total = `Number of unplanned cancellations` + `Number of planned cancellations`) |>
  mutate(
    label = glue('<b>{format(as.Date(date), "%A %e %B, %Y")}</b><br>Planned: {`Number of planned cancellations`}<br>Unplanned: {`Number of unplanned cancellations`}<br>Total: {total}')
  )
bar_chart_data2 <- bar_chart_data |>
  select(-c(total, label)) |>
  pivot_longer(-date)
g_int <- ggplot(
  data = bar_chart_data2,
  mapping = aes(x = date, y = value, fill = name)
) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_col_interactive(
    data = bar_chart_data,
    mapping = aes(x = date, y = total, tooltip = label, data_id = date),
    fill = "transparent"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = format(as.Date(today_date), "%A %e %B, %Y"),
    subtitle = "Number of cancellations",
    x = NULL, y = NULL
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(expand = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#F2F4F8", colour = "#F2F4F8"),
    plot.title = element_textbox_simple(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_textbox_simple(),
    plot.caption = element_textbox_simple(margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 10)),
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.caption.position = "plot",
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
girafe(
  ggobj = g_int,
  bg = "#F2F4F8",
  options = list(
    opts_tooltip(
      css = "
        padding: 5pt;
        font-size: 1rem;
        background-color: #DADFE7;
        border-radius: 3px;
        line-height: 1;
        color: #0E1116;"
    ),
    opts_hover(css = "opacity:1;"),
    opts_hover_inv(css = "opacity:0;"),
    opts_toolbar(saveaspng = FALSE, hidden = "saveaspng"),
    opts_zoom(max = 1),
    opts_sizing(rescale = TRUE, width = 1)
  )
)
```

:::

:::

::: {.card height="25%" expandable=false}

{{< iconlink "data/daily_data.csv" "Data" "download" >}}

:::


# Monthly

## Column {width="40%"}

### Row

```{r}
#| component: valuebox
#| title: Arriving within 5 minutes
perc_perf <- monthly_data |>
  filter(date == today_month) |>
  pull(perf) |>
  paste0("%")
list(
  icon = "stopwatch",
  color = "primary",
  value = perc_perf
)
```

### Row

```{r}
#| component: valuebox
#| title: Change from previous month
comp_perf <- monthly_data |>
  filter(date == today_month) |>
  pull(comparison)
list(
  icon = "graph-up-arrow",
  color = "primary",
  value = comp_perf
)
```

### Row

```{r}
#| component: valuebox
#| title: Worst performing terminus
worst_station <- monthly_data_stations |>
  filter(date == today_month) |>
  slice_min(STPM) |>
  pull(Location)
list(
  icon = "trophy-fill",
  color = "primary",
  value = worst_station
)
```

## Column {width="60%"}

::: {.card height="75%" expandable=false}

```{r}
#| expandable: false
monthly_data_stations %>%
  mutate(
    STPM_fill = case_when(
      STPM >= 92.5 ~ "#92c5de",
      STPM < 92.5 & STPM >= 85 ~ "#f4a582",
      STPM < 92.5 & STPM >= 0 ~ "#b2182b",
      TRUE ~ "white"
    ),
    STPM = if_else(is.na(STPM), "", as.character(STPM))
  ) %>%
  select(Location, STPM, STPM_fill, On_Time_A, On_Time_T) %>%
  reactable(
    columns = list(
      STPM = colDef(
        cell = color_tiles(
          data = .,
          color_ref = "STPM_fill"
        ),
        name = "% arriving within 5 mins",
      ),
      STPM_fill = colDef(show = FALSE),
      On_Time_A = colDef(
        name = "% arrivals within 59s"
      ),
      On_Time_T = colDef(
        name = "% terminations within 59s"
      )
    ),
    searchable = TRUE,
    defaultPageSize = 6
  )
```

:::

::: {.card height="25%" expandable=false}

{{< iconlink "data/202503.csv" "Data" "download" >}}

:::
